findings.description: The candidate rules miss core visual identity patterns for charts, specifically the uniform container styling (Light Blue panel with Brand Blue header), the strict dominant color logic (Brand Blue/Sky Blue), and the rounded shape requirements for bars/icons.

payload.description: Charts must use a uniform rounded Light Blue (#E6F0F9) container with a Brand Blue header. Dominant chart elements must use Brand Blue (#00529b) and Sky Blue (#358CCB), reserving Sunshine (#faa31b) and Gold (#ffc60a) strictly for emphasis on key figures.

findings.description: The headline typography requirements for charts (Agenda for print, Nunito Sans Bold+ for email in ALL CAPS, Brand Blue, with a thin Gold rule beneath) are completely omitted from the candidate rules.

payload.description: Chart headlines must be styled in ALL CAPS using Agenda (for print) or Nunito Sans Bold+ (for email), rendered in Brand Blue with a thin Gold rule directly beneath.
